# coding-ethos ethos reference

## Principles
- [01. SOLID is Law](solid-is-law.md) - Enforce SOLID and simplicity; remove speculative abstractions.
- [02. Fail Fast, Fail Hard (Overview)](fail-fast-fail-hard-overview.md) - Crash early on ambiguous startup and configuration states instead of degrading silently.
- [03. No Conditional Imports](no-conditional-imports.md) - Treat required imports as hard dependencies and fail immediately if they are missing.
- [04. Static Analysis is the First Line of Defense](static-analysis-is-the-first-line-of-defense.md) - Make ruff and mypy blocking quality gates rather than advisory tools.
- [05. No Optional Types for Required Dependencies](no-optional-types-for-required-dependencies.md) - Model required dependencies as non-optional and default to full-strength behavior.
- [06. No Conditional Validation](no-conditional-validation.md) - Run required validation unconditionally; a missing component is itself a failure.
- [07. No "If Available" Capability Checks](no-if-available-capability-checks.md) - Validate required capabilities at startup instead of probing for them at runtime.
- [08. Validation at the Gate](validation-at-the-gate.md) - Validate configuration, schema, and extensions during bootstrap rather
than on first use.
- [09. No Inline CLI Environment Variables](no-inline-cli-environment-variables.md) - Route configuration through validated bootstrap paths instead of
inline shell environment variables.
- [10. Robustness in Motion (Runtime)](robustness-in-motion-runtime.md) - Treat startup misconfiguration and runtime transient failures as
different classes of problems.
- [11. Radical Visibility](radical-visibility.md) - Log important decisions with context and instrument the system with metrics.
- [12. Protocol-First Design](protocol-first-design.md) - Define and verify interfaces before writing or referencing implementations.
- [13. Universal Responsibility](universal-responsibility.md) - Own every error or warning you touch and verify claims with evidence.
- [14. Linting as Code Quality Enforcement](linting-as-code-quality-enforcement.md) - Resolve lint findings with structural fixes; suppress only with documented necessity.
- [15. Feedback as a First-Class Citizen](feedback-as-a-first-class-citizen.md) - Retrieve and address all review feedback proactively.
- [16. No Self-Promotion](no-self-promotion.md) - Let the work speak and omit self-congratulatory commentary.
- [17. Functional Idioms](functional-idioms.md) - Use Python's functional tools when they make code clearer and more local.
- [18. Documentation as Contract](documentation-as-contract.md) - Keep public behavior documented as part of the interface contract.
- [19. One Path for Critical Operations](one-path-for-critical-operations.md) - Keep one explicit, validated path for critical operations.
- [20. Forward Motion Only](forward-motion-only.md) - Fix the current state instead of blaming history or prior authors.
- [21. No Rationalized Shortcuts](no-rationalized-shortcuts.md) - Do not discard work or bypass safety checks in the name of pragmatism.
- [22. Testing as Specification](testing-as-specification.md) - Treat tests as executable behavioral contracts and update them with code changes.
- [23. Exception Hierarchy and Error Messages](exception-hierarchy-and-error-messages.md) - Use precise exception types and actionable, context-rich error messages.
- [24. Security by Design](security-by-design.md) - Design for least privilege, validation, and safe defaults from the start.
- [25. Sub-Agent Delegation and Context Isolation](sub-agent-delegation-and-context-isolation.md) - Use specialized agents with scoped context instead of overloading one thread.
- [26. Evidence-Based Engineering and Decision Quality](evidence-based-engineering-and-decision-quality.md) - Understand, plan, execute, and validate with evidence; measure before
optimizing and make trade-offs explicit.
- [900. Generated Files Are Derived Artifacts](generated-files-are-derived-artifacts.md) - Edit the source ethos or renderer code first, then regenerate the checked-in agent files.
